financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company made more money and reduced its debt, which is a good sign.
Their commercial vehicles and interest earnings helped boost their strong performance.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company is doing a good job managing risks, even though some parts of their business are affected by US tariffs.
They are looking for cheaper ways to borrow money, but most of their current loans have fixed rates, so changes in interest rates won't help much right now.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Average
bullets: The company is doing okay but not great in caring for the environment and society.
There is room for improvement in how the company handles its responsibilities to people and the planet.

speaker_sentiment.title: Speaker Sentiment
speaker_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company leaders spoke with confidence about their strong financial results and future growth plans.
They highlighted improvements in important areas and kept a positive outlook throughout their discussion.

qa_transparency.title: Q&A Transparency
qa_transparency.label: Average
bullets: The company shared some numbers, but didn't explain their plans clearly.
They often gave general answers instead of detailed ones, making it hard to understand their strategy.

overall_sentiment.title: Overall Sentiment
overall_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing well overall, with strong growth in important areas like profits and assets.
There are some worries about certain parts of the business, but the company is confident about future growth.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: The company is doing well financially, with more money coming in and better handling of its loans.
There are some challenges, like potential issues in certain business areas, but overall growth and management are strong.
